title: lindernia nervosa
intro: Lindernia nervosa, also known as False Frogbit or Nervous Flower, is a small, aquatic plant species belonging to the Linderniaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lindernia nervosa include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and hypertension, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Lindernia nervosa is often used as a tea or tincture, and can also be dried and used in infusions or capsules.
